notes: The platformer-2d in-game HUD (M7 a12 exit content) — the declarative few-shot form of what the authored scripts/hud.ts builds at runtime on the V8 host through the M7 T4 `context.ui` TypeScript surface (R-UI-001, owner ruling (a)). A column HUD panel with a score label + a health bar, each read-only data-bound to a numeric state query, and a collect button whose onClick scores points and spends health through the UI->state action path — the platformer's coin-collect loop. UI is presentation (D6): the tree lives outside the sim World, registers no hashed sim component, and its state store folds into no state hash — the m7-exit-4 determinism-presentation gate pins that hash_world is bit-identical with this HUD absent / null-provider / GPU-provider. The headless m7-exit-1 gate lays this tree out + extracts its draw quads with no GPU (the a6 backend's read-only extract), and the cross-process m7-exit-2 gate drives it through the REAL `context ui` dump/query/send/assert verbs (a5). Node `id`s are L-33 lowercase hex (16 chars); rendered text glyphs + GPU draw are the a6/a7/a8 render path — this authored tree is fully headless/CI-assertable today.
